content.rendered:
Explore the LounGenie poolside amenity unit — QR ordering, waterproof safe, solar USB charging, and removable ice bucket. Built for resorts.

Explore every feature of the LounGenie™ — an advanced poolside amenity unit for VIP cabanas, daybeds, clamshells, and premium seating areas. Each unit combines secure storage, solar charging, and beverage cooling — with QR ordering available on 2.0 — into one weather-rated, commercial-grade system.

One Poolside Amenity Unit. Four Guest Wins.

ORDER

Scan, tap, sip — available on 2.0

STASH

Lock valuables, stop worrying

CHARGE

Solar USB keeps devices alive

CHILL

Cold drinks within arm’s reach

Every feature works together inside a single poolside amenity unit — so guests stay longer, spend more, and never leave the deck.


Watch the poolside amenity unit in action →

Stop Guests From Leaving the Deck

THE PROBLEM

Every time a guest walks to the bar to order, you lose a cabana rental minute and a potential upsell. Meanwhile, your staff can’t cover every lounge chair fast enough during peak hours. Guests get frustrated — and frustrated guests don’t rebook.

THE SOLUTION

The LounGenie poolside amenity unit puts ordering and service requests right at the guest’s seat. With LounGenie 2.0, guests scan a QR code with their phone, browse your full F&B menu, and place an order — all without downloading an app. A dedicated order printer provided by PoolSafe prints every ticket for your staff — zero POS integration required. On Service+ and 2.0, a one-tap service call button alerts staff when a guest needs anything.


  • No app download — works in any mobile browser

  • Dedicated order printer provided — no POS integration needed

  • One-tap service call button (Service+ and 2.0)


End the Towel-Over-the-Bag Workaround

THE PROBLEM

Guests drape towels over their belongings and glance back every five minutes. Some skip the pool entirely because they don’t trust leaving valuables unattended. Cabana dwell time drops — and so does your per-guest spend.

THE SOLUTION

Waterproof Safe — 4-digit guest code, waterproof keypad, fits phones, wallets, and room keys. Once their valuables are secure, guests relax. They order another round, book a spa add-on, or simply stay two hours longer than they planned. Secure valuables and charged devices keep guests on the deck longer.


  • 4-digit personal code — no key cards to manage

  • Fits phones, wallets, tablets, laptops, sunglasses, room keys, and more

  • Corrosion-resistant aluminum compartment

Kill the Dead-Battery Excuse

THE PROBLEM

A dead phone means no mobile ordering, no social media posts tagging your property, and no digital room key access. Guests with dying batteries leave the pool to find an outlet — and often don’t come back. Every dead battery is a lost revenue opportunity.

THE SOLUTION

Each poolside amenity unit includes solar-powered USB charging ports that run all day with zero operating cost. Guests plug in, stay put, and keep ordering. Because phones stay charged, guests continue posting poolside photos — giving your property free social exposure throughout the day.


  • Solar-powered — no wiring or electrical hookups

  • Works in all daylight conditions

  • Zero ongoing energy cost


Keep Cold Drinks at Arm’s Reach — Not at the Bar

THE PROBLEM

When a guest’s drink gets warm, they have two choices: walk to the bar for a new one or settle for what they have. Either way, you lose an impulse purchase. Warm drinks lead to lower satisfaction scores — especially at premium cabana price points.

THE SOLUTION

LounGenie’s removable ice bucket sits right inside the unit, keeping drinks cold without a trip to the bar. Staff can swap fresh ice in seconds during routine rounds. Guests stay hydrated, stay happy, and stay in their cabana — ordering another round instead of packing up early.


  • Standard bottle-sized — fits water, beer, wine, and mixers

  • Removable for quick staff swap-outs

  • No power or refrigeration needed

Match Your Property. Own the Look.

THE PROBLEM

Generic pool furniture doesn’t reflect the premium experience your guests are paying for. When every cabana looks the same, your brand disappears into the background. You miss an opportunity to reinforce loyalty at the exact moment guests are most relaxed.

THE SOLUTION

Every poolside amenity unit is fully customizable — match your property’s colors, branding, and aesthetic. Logos and branded advertising are also available. When guests post poolside selfies, your cabana setup looks intentional and polished, not like off-the-shelf equipment.


  • Fully Customizable — Any color, logos, and branded advertising available

  • Clean, cohesive look across all cabanas


Built for Sun, Salt, and Ten Thousand Guest Interactions

THE PROBLEM

Pool equipment takes a beating — UV exposure, chlorine splash, sunscreen residue, and constant guest use. Most electronics and furniture accessories fail within two seasons. You’re stuck replacing gear every year and eating the cost.

THE SOLUTION

LounGenie is constructed from corrosion-resistant aluminum and commercial-grade materials — built to handle high-traffic outdoor environments. It resists UV fading, chemical corrosion, and daily wear from high-traffic use. PoolSafe handles all on-site installation, ongoing maintenance, and service calls. Your team never touches the hardware.


  • Corrosion-resistant aluminum — UV and chemical resistant

  • Designed for high-traffic outdoor environments

  • PoolSafe manages installation, maintenance, and service


See what $0 upfront means for your property →





“At Wild Rivers Waterpark in Irvine California, we pride ourselves on providing an elevated and phenomenal guest experience. Our private cabanas are equipped with great amenities, including a customized LounGenie provided by the great folks at Pool Safe. These all in one; cooler, safe, cup holders, and service call button – provide our guests with 1st class equipment so they can relax and enjoy as their families lounge in the sun. We utilize the integrated cooler and welcome each group with a full bucket of ice and cool refreshments as they arrive in the morning.”

Mike Gioia​

Director. Wild Rivers​

Feature What You Get
QR Ordering Dedicated order printer included — no app download required (2.0)
Waterproof Safe 4-digit guest code, waterproof keypad, fits phones, wallets, and room keys
USB Charging Solar-powered ports, always on, zero operating cost
Removable Ice Bucket Standard bottle-sized, easy swap by staff
Fully Customizable Any color, logos, and branded advertising available
Commercial-Grade Build Corrosion-resistant aluminum, UV-resistant, built for outdoor use

Every poolside amenity unit ships ready to install. PoolSafe handles setup, maintenance, and service — so your team focuses on guests, not hardware.

Ready to Upgrade Your Cabanas?​

The LounGenie poolside amenity unit installs at $0 upfront. We handle everything — hardware, setup, maintenance, and service. You keep the revenue.


Get Your Free Revenue Projection →


See how the smart cabana system works →

content.rendered:
Turn Every Cabana Into a Revenue Engine — $0 Upfront

The LounGenie™ smart cabana system combines QR ordering, a waterproof safe, solar-powered USB charging, and a removable ice bucket into one commercial-grade unit. Hotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, and surf parks see measurable lifts in food and beverage revenue — starting Day 1, with zero capital outlay. We install it. We maintain it. You keep the revenue.

Trusted by Global Hospitality Leaders

Your Pool Deck Is Losing Revenue Right Now

Every pool deck loses revenue the same three ways. Guests leave to charge phones. They skip food orders because no server is nearby. They cut their stay short because they don’t trust leaving valuables on a lounge chair.

Every hour a guest walks off the deck is a missed food and beverage opportunity. Across a full season of cabanas and premium seating areas, those missed orders add up to tens of thousands in lost income — money that never reaches your bottom line.

LounGenie solves all three problems at the guest’s seat.

One System. Every Venue Type.

The LounGenie™ smart cabana system serves hotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, surf parks, country clubs, and municipal aquatic centers. Whether you operate 10 cabanas or 500 premium seating areas — daybeds, clamshells, VIP loungers, and reserved deck chairs — the modular design scales without additional infrastructure. Each unit is weather-rated for year-round outdoor use in any climate, on land or at sea. Every unit is fully customizable — match your property’s colors, branding, and aesthetic. Logos and branded advertising are also available.



Hotel



Resort



Waterparks



Cruise Line



Surf Park



4 Ways the LounGenie™ Smart Cabana System Elevates the Guest Experience

ORDER: QR Ordering & Service Call Button

Guests scan a QR code to order food and drinks — the order prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe. A built-in service call button alerts staff via a touchscreen monitor showing exactly which cabana needs attention. No app download. No POS integration. No added labor. Service call button on Service+ and 2.0. QR ordering on 2.0.

STASH: Waterproof Safe

A waterproof safe with a waterproof keypad lets guests lock phones, wallets, and room keys inside the cabana. When guests feel secure, they swim, relax, and stay on the deck far longer. Properties consistently report that STASH is the single feature guests mention most in reviews.

CHARGE: Solar-Powered USB Charging

Solar panels power the USB charging ports from sunrise to sunset — no wiring, no permits, no electricity cost. When guests can charge poolside, they stop leaving the pool area. And when they stay, they order.

CHILL: Removable Ice Bucket

A removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold at the seat for hours. Cold drinks within arm’s reach encourage high-margin repeat beverage orders throughout the afternoon — without a server needing to check in.

Every LounGenie™ unit is designed for universal accessibility — guests of all ages and mobility levels can reach every feature from a standard lounge chair or wheelchair.


Explore every feature of the poolside amenity unit →

What Happens When a Guest Sits Down

Here is what happens when a guest sits down:

  • 1. They lock their phone, wallet, and room key in the built-in waterproof safe.
  • 2. Next, they plug a device into the solar-powered USB charging port.​
  • 3. Then they scan a QR code or press the service call button to order food and drinks — the order prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe. (QR ordering on 2.0, service call button on Service+ and 2.0.)
  • 4. Finally, their beverages stay cold in the removable ice bucket at arm’s reach.

The guest stays longer. They order more. Your servers only move when someone is ready to spend. Every unit is solar-powered, completely modular, and deploys in minutes — no electrical trenching, no permits, no downtime.


See how it works →


We Install It. We Maintain It. You Keep the Revenue.

The LounGenie™ operates on a revenue-share model — zero upfront cost, zero risk. We provide the hardware, fly to your property for full installation, and handle all ongoing maintenance and service. You generate incremental F&B and cabana rental revenue from Day 1. We share in the upside. That’s it.


Meet the team behind LounGenie →

Why Properties Make More Money With LounGenie

LounGenie drives revenue through two behavioral shifts:

Guests stay longer.

When valuables are locked in the waterproof safe and devices are charging, guests stop leaving the deck. Longer stays mean more ordering windows — more drinks, more food, more spend per visit.

Ordering becomes Instant.

A QR code or service call button removes the gap between “I want a drink” and “I placed an order.” No flagging servers. No missed sales. No friction.

The result: more orders per guest, per visit, per season — at zero upfront cost to your property.

What Hospitality Partners Say About Our Smart Cabana System

“We’ve exceeded our goals since implementing the LounGenie. The product’s design and revenue share partnership have been key to our success. We look forward to working with PoolSafe, Inc. for many years to come.”

Raymond Weissert
General Manager,
The Grove Waterpark and Resort

“The LounGenie has enhanced our guest experience with secure storage, charging ports, and the F&B call button. Our guests love the convenience, and we’ve recommended the LounGenie to others because of the exceptional service.”

Kamiya Woodard
Director of Guest Experience, Orlando World Center Marriott

“The addition of the LounGenie to our cabanas took the experience to the next level. Our guests love the ease of use, and the units have been a big hit. We look forward to continued success with the LounGenie.”

Louis R. Cirigliano, Jr.
General Manager,
Casino Pier and Breakwater Beach

Standard Cabana vs. LounGenie™-Equipped Cabana

Guest Experience Standard Cabana LounGenie™-Equipped Cabana
Valuables Guest worries or leaves early Locked in a waterproof safe
Phone Charging Guest leaves the deck Solar-powered USB charging at the seat
Ordering Food & Drinks Flag down a server or walk to the bar Call button alerts staff (Service+) · QR scan prints order on PoolSafe printer (2.0)
Cold Beverages Drinks warm up quickly Removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold for hours
Revenue per Cabana Minimal — passive furniture Incremental F&B captured throughout the day
Upfront Cost to Property N/A $0 — revenue share model
Maintenance Property handles repairs PoolSafe handles installation, maintenance, and service

Three Tiers. One Goal: More Revenue.

LounGenie™ Classic — Essential Comfort and Security​

Best for properties that want to upgrade basic poolside amenities quickly.


  • STASH: Waterproof safe with waterproof keypad

  • CHARGE: Solar-powered USB port

  • CHILL: Removable ice bucket

LounGenie™ Service+ — Eliminate Dead Runs​

Everything in Classic, plus a dedicated service call button that sends alerts to a staff touchscreen monitor. Your team only moves when a guest needs attention.


  • Includes all Classic features plus a service call button and staff touchscreen monitor.

LounGenie™ 2.0 — Maximum Revenue, Full QR Ordering​

Our flagship smart cabana system turns every chair into an ordering station.


  • Everything in Service+, plus full QR ordering — guests scan to order and it prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe.

  • Includes service call button and staff touchscreen monitor.

  • Eliminates missed orders and wait time.

  • Highest revenue impact of any LounGenie™ configuration.
  • All four features — STASH, CHARGE, CHILL, ORDER — in one unit.


Watch the LounGenie™ in Action

See how our smart cabana system transforms the poolside experience for guests and staff in under 90 seconds.

Frequently Asked Questions About Smart Cabana Systems



What is a smart cabana system?

A smart cabana system is an all-in-one poolside amenity unit that combines guest security, device charging, beverage cooling, and food ordering into a single piece of furniture. The LounGenie™ is the leading smart cabana system in the hospitality industry.



How much does a smart cabana system cost?

The LounGenie™ requires $0 upfront. It operates on a revenue-share model, so your property generates new income from Day 1 without any capital outlay.



Do smart cabanas need electrical wiring?

No. The LounGenie™ is completely solar-powered. There is no electrical trenching, no permits, and no ongoing energy cost. 



How do guests order food from a cabana?

Guests can scan a QR code to place a food and beverage order — the order prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe. No app download needed. Guests can also press a built-in service call button, which sends an alert to a staff touchscreen monitor showing exactly which cabana needs attention. QR ordering is available on LounGenie 2.0. The service call button is available on Service+ and 2.0.



How durable are the units?

Every LounGenie™ unit is built with UV-resistant, weather-rated, corrosion-resistant aluminum and commercial-grade construction.



What about guest adoption?

There is no app to download. Guests scan a QR code with their phone camera or press a physical button. The experience is intuitive from the first use — no instructions, no learning curve.



What about maintenance?

Our team handles full on-site installation and all ongoing maintenance and service.

Ready to Turn Your Pool Deck Into a Profit Center?

Getting started takes three steps:

  • 1. We assess your property layout, cabana count, and premium seating areas.
  • 2. We handle full on-site installation — no wiring, no permits, no downtime.
  • 3. You earn new F&B revenue starting Day 1.

Join the premier hotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, and surf parks already partnering with LounGenie™ to capture revenue that traditional furniture leaves on the table.


Get Your Free Revenue Projection →


See all LounGenie features →

content.rendered:
The Hospitality Innovation Company Turning Pool Decks Into Profit Centers

PoolSafe Inc. (TSX-V: POOL) is the design and technology company behind the LounGenie™ — the award-winning hospitality innovation that bridges the gap between a guest’s lounge chair and your service staff. We partner with the world’s premier resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, and surf parks. Our goal is to transform passive poolside furniture into high-performance, revenue-generating assets.

The Problem That Inspired This Hospitality Innovation

In the competitive luxury market, convenience and security are the top guest priorities. Yet most poolside environments remain completely passive. Three things happen every day:

  1. Guests leave the deck to charge phones — and don’t come back for an hour.
  2. Guests skip food orders because no server is nearby and no ordering system exists.
  3. Guests cut stays short because they feel uneasy leaving valuables on a lounge chair.

Meanwhile, your service staff burns labor on inefficient “dead runs” — walking the deck looking for raised hands that never go up. Traditional cabana setups cost you revenue from both sides: lost guest spending and wasted payroll.


See how the LounGenie™ works →


Our Solution — The LounGenie™

We solve all three problems at the point of contact. The patented LounGenie™ integrates four features into a single poolside unit:


  • ORDER — Guests scan a QR code to place food and beverage orders, which print to a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe. A built-in service call button also sends alerts to a staff touchscreen monitor. No app download needed.

  • STASH — Waterproof safe keeps guest valuables locked and secure.

  • CHARGE — Solar-powered USB charging ports keep devices powered from sunrise to sunset. No wiring or permits required.

  • CHILL — Removable ice bucket keeps beverages cold at arm’s reach for hours.

  • Every unit is also fully customizable — partners can match their property’s colors, branding, and aesthetic, with logos and branded advertising available.

Every unit is designed and built from corrosion-resistant aluminum and commercial-grade materials in our facility in North York, Ontario, Canada, and shipped globally to our partners.

The contoured ergonomic design mounts on wheels and sits at a comfortable height with standard lounge chairs. The top includes three beverage holders with a condensation drain.

Guests stay longer, order more, and leave better reviews — while your staff only moves when someone is ready to spend.

Our Journey — From Concept to Industry Recognition

What started as a single idea — “what if a lounge chair could generate revenue?” — has grown into the leading hospitality innovation platform for outdoor premium environments. Today, the LounGenie™ is deployed at five-star resorts, major waterpark chains, cruise lines, and surf parks worldwide.

Every deployment is designed to deliver three measurable outcomes:

Increase F&B Capture

Frictionless QR ordering and service call buttons turn every cabana into an ordering station.

Extend Guest Dwell Time

Secure valuables and charged devices keep guests on the deck longer.

Eliminate Dead Runs

Your staff only moves when a guest is ready to spend.

We provide the hardware, handle full onsite installation, and manage all ongoing maintenance and service — at $0 upfront through a revenue share model. Your property generates incremental revenue from Day 1 without capital outlay.

Our Mission

At PoolSafe Inc., our mission is to help hospitality operators unlock new revenue opportunities while delivering exceptional guest experiences. We design multifunctional hospitality infrastructure that blends technology, comfort, and security — without increasing operational complexity.

Through strategic partnerships, data-driven insights, and continuous innovation, we empower our clients to modernize premium guest environments and achieve measurable business outcomes.

Our Vision

PoolSafe Inc. envisions a future where the LounGenie™ is as essential to a pool deck as a wall safe is to a hotel room. We strive to be the leading provider of hospitality innovation that enhances guest comfort, convenience, and security — while driving measurable revenue worldwide.

Through continuous technological advancement, seamless integration, and customizable deployments, we aim to elevate the standard for premium outdoor hospitality environments.


See how the smart cabana system works →

Recognized for Hospitality Innovation — IAAPA Brass Ring Award

The IAAPA Brass Ring Award is one of the highest honors in the attractions and hospitality industry. PoolSafe Inc. received this recognition for developing a solution that measurably enhances the guest experience while delivering operational and revenue impact for operators.


What Our Partners Say About This Hospitality Innovation




“We have had a great season and are pleased to say that your PoolSafe product played a big part in that success. Our guests love the convenience and value it provides to their cabana rentals. We’ve seen a positive impact on our F&B sales, and because of this success, we are planning to add new VIP seating locations for the next season to accommodate more of your units.”
Bobby Covach
Cabana/Food & Beverage Director, Cowabunga Bay Waterpark

Partner With the Leaders in Hospitality Innovation

Whether you want to modernize your pool deck, unlock new F&B revenue, or elevate the guest experience at your cabanas and premium seating areas — PoolSafe Inc. is ready to build a custom plan for your property.


Get Your Free Revenue Projection →


Explore every feature of the poolside amenity unit →

Ready to turn your pool deck into a profit center? The LounGenie™ is the poolside revenue solution trusted by leading hotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, and surf parks worldwide. Our team handles everything — from initial property assessment to full on-site installation of our poolside amenity unit — at $0 upfront through a revenue-share model.

Trusted by leading hotels, resorts, and waterparks worldwide.

Why Properties Choose LounGenie

The LounGenie™ is not just another amenity — it is a complete revenue-generating system designed to increase food and beverage capture, extend guest dwell time, and eliminate costly dead runs. Every unit includes a waterproof safe, solar-powered USB charging, and a removable ice bucket — with QR ordering available on the 2.0 model. All built into one commercial-grade system. Guests stay longer, order more, and leave better reviews. PoolSafe Inc. handles full installation, ongoing maintenance, and service — so your operations team focuses on guests, not hardware. Every deployment operates on a revenue-share model — no upfront cost, no risk, and no long-term contract required.


Explore every feature of the poolside amenity unit →

Frequently Asked Questions About Contacting LounGenie



How quickly will I hear back after contacting LounGenie?

Most inquiries receive a response within one business day. If you request a revenue projection, our team typically delivers it within 48 hours.



Is there any cost to contact LounGenie or request a projection?

No. Every consultation, property assessment, and revenue projection is completely free. The LounGenie operates on a $0 upfront, revenue-share model — so there is no cost at any stage of the conversation.



What information should I have ready before reaching out?

The most helpful details are your property type (hotel, resort, water park, or theme park), the number of cabanas or premium seating areas, and your current poolside F&B setup. This allows our team to tailor a revenue projection specific to your property.

Ready to Get Started?

Whether you’re exploring the LounGenie™ for the first time or ready to schedule a site visit, PoolSafe Inc. is here to build a custom plan for your property. Every deployment includes ongoing maintenance and service at no additional cost.


See how the smart cabana system works →

content.rendered:
Meet the LounGenie Leadership Team​

Behind every LounGenie deployment is a leadership team with deep expertise in hospitality operations, corporate finance, and global brand marketing. Specifically, this team has guided Pool Safe Inc. from early-stage development to partnerships with some of the world’s most recognized hotel, resort, and waterpark brands. In short, their combined experience drives the strategy, innovation, and operational excellence behind the LounGenie smart cabana system.

Board of Directors


David Berger
CEO

Mr. David Berger is Executive Chairman and CEO, Pool Safe Inc. Mr. Berger was formerly the Director of Operations of Kiddie Ride Entertainment Limited, a company he founded to create fun and exciting amusement rides for children, located in shopping malls across southern Ontario. Prior to Kiddie Ride, Mr. Berger held the position of Managing Director at Jodami Enterprises Limited, an Engineering company that provided plumbing and electrical supplies across the Greater Toronto Area.

 

Steven Glaser
COO, CFO & Director

Mr. Steven Glaser is Chief Operating Officer, Chief Financial Officer and Director, Pool Safe Inc. Mr. Glaser is a financial service executive with a diverse background in corporate finance, communications and governance for private and public companies. He spent the last eight years working in the corporate finance and investment banking arena focused on assisting late stage private and early stage public companies with strategic planning and capital raising. Prior to that, Mr. Glaser spent seven years as Vice President Corporate Affairs of Azure Dynamics Corporation. He was responsible for the company’s corporate governance, its domestic and international stock exchange listings, as well as the build-out of the company’s Investor Relations division. Mr. Glaser holds a Bachelor of Administrative Studies degree as well as an M.B.A. in finance.

 

Steven Mintz
Director

Mr. Steven Mintz is Director, Pool Safe Inc. Mr. Mintz is a graduate from the University of Toronto and obtained his C.A. designation in June of 1992. Between 1992 and 1997, Mr. Mintz was employed by a boutique bankruptcy and insolvency firm. He obtained his Trustee in Bankruptcy license in 1995. Since January 1997 he has been a self-employed financial consultant, serving private individuals and companies as well as public companies in a variety of industries, including mining, oil and gas, real estate and investment strategies. He is currently a director of 22 Capital Corp, Everton Resources Inc., Mooncor Oil and Gas Corp. and Portage Biotech Inc.

 

Gillian Deacon
Marketing Executive

Ms. Deacon brings over 15 years of integrated marketing experience across brand, experiential, partnership and content marketing. Ms. Deacon is currently the Vice President of Partnership Marketing for the Arizona Cardinals Football Club overseeing the day-to-day operations and direct supervision to the corporate partnership activation and service staff and all related functions. Prior to joining the Cardinals, Ms. Deacon was located in New York City as the Vice President, Solutions and Operations at Oak View Group (Nov 2020 – April 2025), the largest developer of sports and entertainment facilities in the world, with over $5 billion committed spend on new arena developments in various prime global locales. Leading to OVG, Ms. Deacon drove the initial formation and further growth, and development of the Wasserman Experience division in Canada, an industry leading global sports, entertainment and lifestyle company working with some of the world’s most iconic brands, properties and talent.

  

Robert Pratt
Director

Mr. Pratt is currently the President of R. Pratt Consulting Ltd. From 2018-2024 he was President and Chief Operating Officer at Sandman Hotel Group and Sutton Place Hotels, a Canadian hotel chain. From October 2015 until July 2018, Mr. Pratt was the President of One Lodging Management, responsible for the day-to-day operations of 119 properties.

In short, their combined experience […]
